title: Current governance and static-safety audit bundle was not yet published
resolution: Published the current audit bundle and linked it from the security audit status page.

title: Legacy memory command forms failed instead of mapping to the current native CLI surface
resolution: Added compatibility aliases for working-brief save, validation-plan, and completion-gate upsert with regression tests.

title: Legacy orchestration task flags and complete-phase wording failed instead of resolving to the current lifecycle model
resolution: Added lifecycle flag aliases, implicit task and requirement identifier derivation, and complete-phase normalization with regression tests.
